execute.stdout: red red green green blue blue

code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut current = ""
mut output = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      output = "#{output}#{current} #{current} "
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  output = "#{output}#{current} #{current} "
end

let out_len = string.len(output)
let final_out = if out_len > 0
  string.substring(output, 0, out_len - 1)
else
  output
end

println(final_out)
